classObjective: Use dimensional analysis to convert between units of measurement and apply formulas to solve real-world problems.
workedExamples: 2-7, Example 5 — Dimensional Analysis and Unit Conversion (Conversion Factors)
2-7, Example 7 — Dimensional Analysis (Chain Conversions and Real-World Formula Application)
warmUp: Convert 5 feet to inches using dimensional analysis
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: conversion factors; metric-to-imperial conversions; chain conversions; real-world formula application
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice using dimensional analysis for unit conversions including multi-step chain conversions
independentPractice: Practice problems using dimensional analysis for unit conversions and formula application
assessment: Exit ticket: convert 100 miles per hour to feet per second using dimensional analysis
capReflection: How does dimensional analysis help you avoid errors in unit conversions?
